message:
fix: tighten email validation and prevent stats bar overflow in widget export (#8729)

Use net/mail.ParseAddress plus a domain regex to reject malformed emails
like "a@", "@@", or "user@localhost". Add overflow handling (flexWrap,
overflow-hidden, min-w-0) to the widget export stats bar and preview
container so stat blocks wrap instead of overflowing.

Fixes #8688, Fixes #8686

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
